entries.title: Campaign groups index.
entries.notes: Requires Campaign Studio plus required Capell extensions installed, package migrations, and seeded campaign groups linked to sites.
entries.useCase: A marketer reviews active campaign groups before managing landing pages, CTAs, and goals.

entries.title: Campaign landing pages index.
entries.notes: Requires seeded campaign groups, target pages, primary goals, and campaign URLs. The batch harness still needs dependency extension state fixed before final install screenshots.
entries.useCase: A marketer checks which public pages are attached to campaigns and which goal each page should optimize for.

entries.title: Campaign conversion goals form.
entries.notes: Requires at least one seeded campaign group. Include goal type, attribution model, and active/inactive state fields in the capture.
entries.useCase: A marketer defines the measurable outcome that campaign landing pages and conversions report against.

entries.title: CTA block form.
entries.notes: Requires a seeded campaign group and target URL or target page. Capture title, body, button/action, style, and tracking fields.
entries.useCase: A marketer creates a reusable campaign CTA block with conversion tracking metadata.

entries.title: Campaign dashboard blocks.
entries.notes: Requires the host dashboard to register Campaign Studio widgets and seeded visits, events, landing pages, goals, and conversions.
entries.useCase: A marketer reviews campaign performance, top campaign groups, and top landing pages from the admin dashboard.

entries.title: Frontend landing page with campaign blocks.
entries.notes: Requires a seeded public page using campaign hero, CTA, or lead-form blocks plus Form Builder and Layout Builder. Verify public HTML does not expose admin-only campaign metadata.
entries.useCase: A visitor lands on a campaign page with tracked hero, CTA, and lead-capture content.
